title: Airbnb (ABNB) Q3 earnings report 2024
text: Airbnb reported $3.73 billion in revenue, up 10% year over year. Earnings per share came in at $2.13 versus $2.14 expected. Net income of $1.37 billion, compared with $4.37 billion in the same period last year. Adjusted EBITDA for the third quarter was $2 billion, up 7% year over year, exceeding analyst expectations of $1.86 billion. Gross booking value totaled $20.1 billion in the third quarter, above the $19.9 billion expected by analysts. The company reported 123 million nights and experiences booked, up 8% from a year ago and higher than the 121.4 million expected. Average daily rates increased 1% from a year ago to $164 in the third quarter. The company said in its shareholder letter that it has more than 8 million active listings. Airbnb reported third-quarter earnings that were shy of analyst estimates, though it squeaked in a small revenue beat, with the stock falling about 3% in after-hours trading.
